name: Banana Split Sundaes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate in a 2-cup measure.
2. Cook on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or until melted, stirring once.
3. Stir in corn syrup and sweetened condensed milk.
4. Cook uncovered on 100% power for 45 seconds to 1 minute or until heated through.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Serve warm atop ice cream.
7. Sprinkle with peanuts.
8. Arrange quartered bananas around the ice cream.
